Package org.key_project.util.bean

Class Bean

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.util.bean.Bean
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBean
public class Bean extends Object implements IBean
Implements the basic methods that a Java bean should have and is the default implementation of IBean.
See Also:

    • addPropertyChangeListener

      public void addPropertyChangeListener(String propertyName, PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Adds the given listener for the given property only.
      Specified by:
      addPropertyChangeListener in interface IBean
      Parameters:
      propertyName - The property to observe.
      listener - The listener to add.

      Removes the given listener from the given property.

      removePropertyChangeListener in interface IBean
      Parameters:
      propertyName - The property to no longer observe.
      listener - The listener to remove.

      public boolean hasListeners()
      Checks if listeners are available.
      Specified by:
      hasListeners in interface IBean
      Returns:
      true listeners available, false no listeners are available.

    • hasListeners

      public boolean hasListeners(String propertyName)
      Checks if listeners are available for the given property.
      Specified by:
      hasListeners in interface IBean
      Parameters:
      propertyName - The property name.
      Returns:
      true listeners available for the property, false no listeners are available for the property.

      index - The changed index.
      oldValue - The old value.
      newValue - The new value.

    • hasListener

      public boolean hasListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Checks if the given listener is already available.
      Specified by:
      hasListener in interface IBean
      Parameters:
      listener - The listener to check.
      Returns:
      true listener is available, false listener is not available.

    • hasListener

      public boolean hasListener(String propertyName, PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Checks if the given listener is available for the given property.

      hasListener in interface IBean

      propertyName - The property.
